visualizerParams.title: Combinatoric Selections
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the combinations count using symmetry and early breaking to optimize the search.

solution.explanation: Since `nCr` increases until `r = n/2` and then decreases symmetrically, we only need to find the first `r` that exceeds the threshold. Everything between `r` and `n-r` will also exceed it. This reduces the number of calls to `math.comb` significantly.
